Prefer ESM, Understand CJS Interop
description:
Use ES modules (import/export) as the default for new projects. Set "type": "module" in package.json. ESM gives you static analysis, tree-shaking, and top-level await.

Key interop rules:
- ESM can import CJS: import pkg from 'cjs-package' (gets default export)
- CJS cannot require() ESM — use dynamic import(): const mod = await import('esm-package')
- Named exports from CJS may need destructuring from default: import pkg from 'cjs-lib'; const { method } = pkg;
- __dirname and __filename don't exist in ESM — use: import.meta.dirname and import.meta.filename (Node 21+), or path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url)) for older versions
